title: AANA Support Adapter Expansion Plan
positioning: These are expansion candidates after the first enforced internal support baseline was measured. They are not supported production adapters yet.

first_enforced_baseline_gate.promotion_rule: Do not add any expansion adapter to adapter_gallery.product_lines.support.adapter_ids until this gate passes and the adapter has executable fixtures, verifier ownership, evidence requirements, AIx tuning, human review routing, audit-safe examples, and domain-owner signoff.

candidate_statuses.expansion_candidate: Productized in the expansion roadmap, but not yet a supported executable adapter.
candidate_statuses.pilot_candidate: Executable fixtures and verifier module exist, but enforcement is still shadow/advisory only.
candidate_statuses.supported: Cataloged in adapter_gallery.product_lines.support.adapter_ids with release-gated fixtures and owner signoff.

candidates.title: Refund Decision Boundary Checker
candidates.product_boundary: Check refund eligibility language and refund-action recommendations before customer-visible reply or operational action.
verifier_behavior: defer refund exceptions and policy ambiguity
candidates.human_review_path: Refund exception and policy ambiguity queue
caveats: Do not enforce autonomous refunds from this candidate plan.
Real refund action requires downstream system authorization outside AANA.

candidates.title: Account Closure Guardrail
candidates.product_boundary: Check account-closure guidance or action proposals for identity verification, irreversible-action approval, retention obligations, and customer confirmation.
verifier_behavior: defer legal hold or open dispute conflicts
require explicit human approval for irreversible closure
candidates.human_review_path: Account closure and identity uncertainty queue
caveats: Closure must fail closed when identity, retention, or approval evidence is missing.

candidates.title: Chargeback Support Reply Guardrail
candidates.product_boundary: Check chargeback-related replies for policy accuracy, dispute status, legal/payment sensitivity, and safe escalation.
verifier_behavior: block payment network or legal promises without evidence
candidates.human_review_path: Billing dispute and legal escalation queue
caveats: Chargeback replies may trigger legal or payment-network obligations and require owner approval.

candidates.title: Cancellation Policy Guardrail
candidates.product_boundary: Check cancellation replies and action proposals for verified account state, policy, retention offers, and irreversible cancellation approval.
verifier_behavior: revise unsupported fee or effective-date claims
candidates.human_review_path: Cancellation exception and retention review queue
caveats: Cancellation action execution remains outside AANA and must require downstream authorization.

candidates.title: Support Escalation Router
candidates.product_boundary: Check whether support replies or ticket updates should escalate to human, fraud, legal, privacy, billing, or manager review before customer-visible output.
verifier_behavior: ask for verification when identity is uncertain
revise unsafe tone or unsupported commitments
caveats: Escalation routing should bias toward defer when classifier confidence is weak.

candidates.title: Retention And Deletion Request Guardrail
candidates.product_boundary: Check replies and action proposals for data retention, deletion, access, or privacy requests before customer-visible response or operational routing.
verifier_behavior: block deletion promises without approved policy and identity verification
defer legal hold or regulated retention conflicts
route privacy requests to approved human review
caveats: Privacy requests require jurisdiction- and policy-specific handling outside the generic support adapter set.
